authors_text: Dawei Wang,Lingping Gao,Ziquan Lan,Wei Li,Jiaping Ren,Jiahui Zhang,Peng Zhang,Pei Zhou,Shengao Wang,Jia Pan,Dinesh Manocha,Ruigang Yang
title: An Intelligent Self-driving Truck System For Highway Transportation
title_zh: 公路运输智能自动驾驶卡车系统
abstract: Recently, there have been many advances in autonomous driving society, attracting a lot of attention from academia and industry. However, existing works mainly focus on cars, extra development is still required for self-driving truck algorithms and models. In this paper, we introduce an intelligent self-driving truck system. Our presented system consists of three main components, 1) a realistic traffic simulation module for generating realistic traffic flow in testing scenarios, 2) a high-fidelity truck model which is designed and evaluated for mimicking real truck response in real-world deployment, 3) an intelligent planning module with learning-based decision making algorithm and multi-mode trajectory planner, taking into account the truck's constraints, road slope changes, and the surrounding traffic flow. We provide quantitative evaluations for each component individually to demonstrate the fidelity and performance of each part. We also deploy our proposed system on a real truck and conduct real world experiments which shows our system's capacity of mitigating sim-to-real gap. Our code is available at https://github.com/InceptioResearch/IITS
summary: Recently, there have been many advances in autonomous driving society, attracting a lot of attention from academia and industry. However, existing works mainly focus on cars, extra development is still required for self-driving truck algorithms and models. In this paper, we introduce an intelligent self-driving truck system. Our presented system consists of three main components, 1) a realistic traffic simulation module for generating realistic traffic flow in testing scenarios, 2) a high-fidelity truck model which is designed and evaluated for mimicking real truck response in real-world deployment, 3) an intelligent planning module with learning-based decision making algorithm and multi-mode trajectory planner, taking into account the truck's constraints, road slope changes, and the surrounding traffic flow. We provide quantitative evaluations for each component individually to demonstrate the fidelity and performance of each part. We also deploy our proposed system on a real truck and conduct real world experiments which shows our system's capacity of mitigating sim-to-real gap. Our code is available at https://github.com/InceptioResearch/IITS
abstract_zh: 近年来，自动驾驶社会取得了诸多进展，引起了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。然而，现有的工作主要集中在汽车上，自动驾驶卡车算法和模型仍需要额外的开发。在本文中，我们介绍了一种智能自动驾驶卡车系统。我们提出的系统由三个主要组件组成，1）一个用于在测试场景中生成真实交通流的真实交通模拟模块，2）一个高保真卡车模型，其设计和评估用于模仿现实世界部署中的真实卡车响应，3）一个具有基于学习的决策算法和多模式轨迹规划器的智能规划模块，考虑到卡车的约束、道路坡度变化和周围交通流。我们为每个组件单独提供定量评估，以证明每个部件的保真度和性能。我们还将我们提出的系统部署在真实的卡车上，并进行现实世界的实验，这表明我们的系统具有缩小模拟与真实差距的能力。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/InceptioResearch/IITS 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高速公路运输的智能自动驾驶卡车系统，包含交通仿真模块、高保真卡车模型和智能规划模块。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶研究主要针对汽车，缺乏针对卡车的专用算法和模型，需开发适应卡车特性的自动驾驶系统以解决实际部署中的仿真与现实差距问题。
AI.method: 系统包含三个核心模块：1) 基于真实交通流的仿真模块；2) 考虑卡车动力学特性的高保真模型；3) 结合学习决策算法和多模式轨迹规划的智能规划模块，并通过定量评估和实地实验验证性能。
AI.result: 各模块独立评估显示高保真度，实地实验表明系统有效缓解了仿真与现实环境的差异，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的系统为高速公路自动驾驶卡车提供了可行方案，为后续研究奠定了基础。

However, existing works mainly focus on cars, extra development is still required for self-driving truck algorithms and models. In this paper, we introduce an intelligent self-driving truck system. Our presented system consists of three main components, 1) a realistic traffic simulation module for generating realistic traffic flow in testing scenarios, 2) a high-fidelity truck model which is designed and evaluated for mimicking real truck response in real-world deployment, 3) an intelligent planning module with learning-based decision making algorithm and multi-mode trajectory planner, taking into account the truck's constraints, road slope changes, and the surrounding traffic flow. We provide quantitative evaluations for each component individually to demonstrate the fidelity and performance of each part. We also deploy our proposed system on a real truck and conduct real world experiments which shows our system's capacity of mitigating sim-to-real gap. title: SimSR: Simple Distance-based State Representation for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: SimSR：深度强化学习的简单基于距离的状态表示
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2022, Preprint version with Appendix
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2022, Preprint version with Appendix
abstract: This work explores how to learn robust and generalizable state representation from image-based observations with deep reinforcement learning methods. Addressing the computational complexity, stringent assumptions and representation collapse challenges in existing work of bisimulation metric, we devise Simple State Representation (SimSR) operator. SimSR enables us to design a stochastic approximation method that can practically learn the mapping functions (encoders) from observations to latent representation space. In addition to the theoretical analysis and comparison with the existing work, we experimented and compared our work with recent state-of-the-art solutions in visual MuJoCo tasks. The results shows that our model generally achieves better performance and has better robustness and good generalization.
summary: This work explores how to learn robust and generalizable state representation from image-based observations with deep reinforcement learning methods. Addressing the computational complexity, stringent assumptions and representation collapse challenges in existing work of bisimulation metric, we devise Simple State Representation (SimSR) operator. SimSR enables us to design a stochastic approximation method that can practically learn the mapping functions (encoders) from observations to latent representation space. In addition to the theoretical analysis and comparison with the existing work, we experimented and compared our work with recent state-of-the-art solutions in visual MuJoCo tasks. The results shows that our model generally achieves better performance and has better robustness and good generalization.
abstract_zh: 这项工作探讨了如何使用深度强化学习方法从基于图像的观察中学习稳健且可概括的状态表示。为了解决现有互模拟度量工作中的计算复杂性、严格假设和表示崩溃的挑战，我们设计了简单状态表示（SimSR）算子。 SimSR 使我们能够设计一种随机近似方法，该方法可以实际学习从观察到潜在表示空间的映射函数（编码器）。除了理论分析和与现有工作的比较之外，我们还对我们的工作进行了实验，并将其与视觉 MuJoCo 任务中最新的解决方案进行了比较。结果表明，我们的模型总体上取得了更好的性能，并且具有更好的鲁棒性和良好的泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过深度强化学习方法，从图像观察中学习稳健且可泛化的状态表示，并提出了一种基于距离的简单状态表示（SimSR）算子。
AI.motivation: 现有双模拟度量方法存在计算复杂度高、严格假设及表示崩溃等挑战，需设计更高效且稳健的状态表示方法。
AI.method: 提出Simple State Representation (SimSR) 算子，设计随机近似方法，学习从观察到潜在表示空间的映射函数。
AI.result: 在视觉MuJoCo任务中实验表明，该模型在性能、鲁棒性和泛化能力方面优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SimSR有效解决了现有方法的局限性，在理论分析和实验验证中均展现出优越性，为深度强化学习的状态表示提供了新思路。

Addressing the computational complexity, stringent assumptions and representation collapse challenges in existing work of bisimulation metric, we devise Simple State Representation (SimSR) operator. SimSR enables us to design a stochastic approximation method that can practically learn the mapping functions (encoders) from observations to latent representation space. In addition to the theoretical analysis and comparison with the existing work, we experimented and compared our work with recent state-of-the-art solutions in visual MuJoCo tasks. The results shows that our model generally achieves better performance and has better robustness and good generalization. 这项工作探讨了如何使用深度强化学习方法从基于图像的观察中学习稳健且可概括的状态表示。为了解决现有互模拟度量工作中的计算复杂性、严格假设和表示崩溃的挑战，我们设计了简单状态表示（SimSR）算子。 SimSR 使我们能够设计一种随机近似方法，该方法可以实际学习从观察到潜在表示空间的映射函数（编码器）。除了理论分析和与现有工作的比较之外，我们还对我们的工作进行了实验，并将其与视觉 MuJoCo 任务中最新的解决方案进行了比较。结果表明，我们的模型总体上取得了更好的性能，并且具有更好的鲁棒性和良好的泛化性。 本文旨在通过深度强化学习方法，从图像观察中学习稳健且可泛化的状态表示，并提出了一种基于距离的简单状态表示（SimSR）算子。 Hongyu Zang,Xin Li,Mingzhong Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shaolun Ruan,Yong Wang,Hailong Jiang,Weijia Xu,Qiang Guan
title: BatchLens: A Visualization Approach for Analyzing Batch Jobs in Cloud Systems
title_zh: BatchLens：一种用于分析云系统中批处理作业的可视化方法
abstract: Cloud systems are becoming increasingly powerful and complex. It is highly challenging to identify anomalous execution behaviors and pinpoint problems by examining the overwhelming intermediate results/states in complex application workflows. Domain scientists urgently need a friendly and functional interface to understand the quality of the computing services and the performance of their applications in real time. To meet these needs, we explore data generated by job schedulers and investigate general performance metrics (e.g., utilization of CPU, memory and disk I/O). Specifically, we propose an interactive visual analytics approach, BatchLens, to provide both providers and users of cloud service with an intuitive and effective way to explore the status of system batch jobs and help them conduct root-cause analysis of anomalous behaviors in batch jobs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of BatchLens through a case study on the public Alibaba bench workload trace datasets.
summary: Cloud systems are becoming increasingly powerful and complex. It is highly challenging to identify anomalous execution behaviors and pinpoint problems by examining the overwhelming intermediate results/states in complex application workflows. Domain scientists urgently need a friendly and functional interface to understand the quality of the computing services and the performance of their applications in real time. To meet these needs, we explore data generated by job schedulers and investigate general performance metrics (e.g., utilization of CPU, memory and disk I/O). Specifically, we propose an interactive visual analytics approach, BatchLens, to provide both providers and users of cloud service with an intuitive and effective way to explore the status of system batch jobs and help them conduct root-cause analysis of anomalous behaviors in batch jobs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of BatchLens through a case study on the public Alibaba bench workload trace datasets.
abstract_zh: 云系统变得越来越强大和复杂。通过检查复杂的应用程序工作流程中大量的中间结果/状态来识别异常执行行为并查明问题非常具有挑战性。领域科学家迫切需要一个友好且功能齐全的界面来实时了解计算服务的质量及其应用程序的性能。为了满足这些需求，我们探索作业调度程序生成的数据并研究一般性能指标（例如 CPU、内存和磁盘 I/O 的利用率）。具体来说，我们提出了一种交互式可视化分析方法BatchLens，为云服务的提供商和用户提供直观有效的方法来探索系统批处理作业的状态，并帮助他们对批处理作业中的异常行为进行根本原因分析。我们通过对公共阿里巴巴工作负载跟踪数据集的案例研究证明了 BatchLens 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BatchLens，一种用于分析云系统中批处理作业的可视化方法，帮助用户实时监控作业状态并进行根因分析。
AI.motivation: 云系统日益复杂，传统方法难以从海量中间结果中识别异常行为，领域科学家需要直观工具实时分析计算服务质量和应用性能。
AI.method: 通过分析作业调度器生成的数据和通用性能指标（如CPU、内存、磁盘I/O利用率），设计交互式可视化分析工具BatchLens，支持用户探索系统批处理作业状态并定位异常行为根源。
AI.result: 通过公共的阿里巴巴基准工作负载数据集案例研究，验证了BatchLens在分析批处理作业异常行为中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BatchLens为云服务提供商和用户提供了直观有效的分析手段，能够实时监控批处理作业状态并辅助根因分析，满足实际需求。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出BatchLens，一种用于分析云系统中批处理作业的可视化方法，帮助用户实时监控作业状态并进行根因分析。
ai_content.motivation: 云系统日益复杂，传统方法难以从海量中间结果中识别异常行为，领域科学家需要直观工具实时分析计算服务质量和应用性能。
ai_content.method: 通过分析作业调度器生成的数据和通用性能指标（如CPU、内存、磁盘I/O利用率），设计交互式可视化分析工具BatchLens，支持用户探索系统批处理作业状态并定位异常行为根源。
ai_content.result: 通过公共的阿里巴巴基准工作负载数据集案例研究，验证了BatchLens在分析批处理作业异常行为中的有效性。

ai_content_json.method: 通过分析作业调度器生成的数据和通用性能指标（如CPU、内存、磁盘I/O利用率），设计交互式可视化分析工具BatchLens，支持用户探索系统批处理作业状态并定位异常行为根源。
ai_content_json.result: 通过公共的阿里巴巴基准工作负载数据集案例研究，验证了BatchLens在分析批处理作业异常行为中的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: BatchLens为云服务提供商和用户提供了直观有效的分析手段，能够实时监控批处理作业状态并辅助根因分析，满足实际需求。

tldr: 本文提出BatchLens，一种用于分析云系统中批处理作业的可视化方法，帮助用户实时监控作业状态并进行根因分析。
motivation: 云系统日益复杂，传统方法难以从海量中间结果中识别异常行为，领域科学家需要直观工具实时分析计算服务质量和应用性能。
method: 通过分析作业调度器生成的数据和通用性能指标（如CPU、内存、磁盘I/O利用率），设计交互式可视化分析工具BatchLens，支持用户探索系统批处理作业状态并定位异常行为根源。
result: 通过公共的阿里巴巴基准工作负载数据集案例研究，验证了BatchLens在分析批处理作业异常行为中的有效性。
conclusion: BatchLens为云服务提供商和用户提供了直观有效的分析手段，能够实时监控批处理作业状态并辅助根因分析，满足实际需求。
search_text: BatchLens: A Visualization Approach for Analyzing Batch Jobs in Cloud Systems BatchLens：一种用于分析云系统中批处理作业的可视化方法 Cloud systems are becoming increasingly powerful and complex. It is highly challenging to identify anomalous execution behaviors and pinpoint problems by examining the overwhelming intermediate results/states in complex application workflows. Domain scientists urgently need a friendly and functional interface to understand the quality of the computing services and the performance of their applications in real time. To meet these needs, we explore data generated by job schedulers and investigate general performance metrics (e.g., utilization of CPU, memory and disk I/O). Specifically, we propose an interactive visual analytics approach, BatchLens, to provide both providers and users of cloud service with an intuitive and effective way to explore the status of system batch jobs and help them conduct root-cause analysis of anomalous behaviors in batch jobs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of BatchLens through a case study on the public Alibaba bench workload trace datasets. 云系统变得越来越强大和复杂。通过检查复杂的应用程序工作流程中大量的中间结果/状态来识别异常执行行为并查明问题非常具有挑战性。领域科学家迫切需要一个友好且功能齐全的界面来实时了解计算服务的质量及其应用程序的性能。为了满足这些需求，我们探索作业调度程序生成的数据并研究一般性能指标（例如 CPU、内存和磁盘 I/O 的利用率）。具体来说，我们提出了一种交互式可视化分析方法BatchLens，为云服务的提供商和用户提供直观有效的方法来探索系统批处理作业的状态，并帮助他们对批处理作业中的异常行为进行根本原因分析。我们通过对公共阿里巴巴工作负载跟踪数据集的案例研究证明了 BatchLens 的有效性。 本文提出BatchLens，一种用于分析云系统中批处理作业的可视化方法，帮助用户实时监控作业状态并进行根因分析。 Shaolun Ruan,Yong Wang,Hailong Jiang,Weijia Xu,Qiang Guan cs.HC

authors_text: Dongjie Ye,Zhangkai Ni,Hanli Wang,Jian Zhang,Shiqi Wang,Sam Kwong
title: CSformer: Bridging Convolution and Transformer for Compressive Sensing
title_zh: CSformer：用于压缩感知的桥接卷积和变压器
abstract: Convolution neural networks (CNNs) have succeeded in compressive image sensing. However, due to the inductive bias of locality and weight sharing, the convolution operations demonstrate the intrinsic limitations in modeling the long-range dependency. Transformer, designed initially as a sequence-to-sequence model, excels at capturing global contexts due to the self-attention-based architectures even though it may be equipped with limited localization abilities. This paper proposes CSformer, a hybrid framework that integrates the advantages of leveraging both detailed spatial information from CNN and the global context provided by transformer for enhanced representation learning. The proposed approach is an end-to-end compressive image sensing method, composed of adaptive sampling and recovery. In the sampling module, images are measured block-by-block by the learned sampling matrix. In the reconstruction stage, the measurement is projected into dual stems. One is the CNN stem for modeling the neighborhood relationships by convolution, and the other is the transformer stem for adopting global self-attention mechanism. The dual branches structure is concurrent, and the local features and global representations are fused under different resolutions to maximize the complementary of features. Furthermore, we explore a progressive strategy and window-based transformer block to reduce the parameter and computational complexity. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the dedicated transformer-based architecture for compressive sensing, which achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods on different datasets.
summary: Convolution neural networks (CNNs) have succeeded in compressive image sensing. However, due to the inductive bias of locality and weight sharing, the convolution operations demonstrate the intrinsic limitations in modeling the long-range dependency. Transformer, designed initially as a sequence-to-sequence model, excels at capturing global contexts due to the self-attention-based architectures even though it may be equipped with limited localization abilities. This paper proposes CSformer, a hybrid framework that integrates the advantages of leveraging both detailed spatial information from CNN and the global context provided by transformer for enhanced representation learning. The proposed approach is an end-to-end compressive image sensing method, composed of adaptive sampling and recovery. In the sampling module, images are measured block-by-block by the learned sampling matrix. In the reconstruction stage, the measurement is projected into dual stems. One is the CNN stem for modeling the neighborhood relationships by convolution, and the other is the transformer stem for adopting global self-attention mechanism. The dual branches structure is concurrent, and the local features and global representations are fused under different resolutions to maximize the complementary of features. Furthermore, we explore a progressive strategy and window-based transformer block to reduce the parameter and computational complexity. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the dedicated transformer-based architecture for compressive sensing, which achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods on different datasets.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在压缩图像传感方面取得了成功。然而，由于局部性和权重共享的归纳偏差，卷积运算表现出了对远程依赖性建模的内在局限性。 Transformer 最初被设计为序列到序列模型，由于基于自注意力的架构，即使其定位能力有限，也擅长捕获全局上下文。本文提出了 CSformer，这是一种混合框架，它集成了利用 CNN 的详细空间信息和 Transformer 提供的全局上下文的优势，以增强表示学习。所提出的方法是一种端到端压缩图像传感方法，由自适应采样和恢复组成。在采样模块中，通过学习的采样矩阵逐块测量图像。在重建阶段，测量值被投影到双干中。一种是通过卷积对邻域关系进行建模的CNN茎，另一种是采用全局自注意力机制的变压器茎。双分支结构是并发的，在不同分辨率下融合局部特征和全局表示，最大限度地实现特征的互补。此外，我们探索了一种渐进策略和基于窗口的变压器块，以减少参数和计算复杂性。实验结果证明了基于变压器的专用压缩感知架构的有效性，与不同数据集上最先进的方法相比，该架构实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CSformer，一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer的混合框架，用于改进压缩感知中的图像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在建模长距离依赖性方面存在局限，而Transformer虽擅长全局上下文建模但缺乏局部细节捕捉能力，需融合两者优势以提升压缩感知性能。
AI.method: 设计端到端框架，包含自适应采样模块和双分支恢复模块（CNN分支处理局部关系，Transformer分支通过自注意力机制建模全局上下文），并采用渐进策略与窗口化Transformer块降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，CSformer相比现有方法在图像重建质量上取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 混合CNN与Transformer的架构有效结合了局部细节与全局上下文信息，验证了Transformer在压缩感知任务中的潜力。

However, due to the inductive bias of locality and weight sharing, the convolution operations demonstrate the intrinsic limitations in modeling the long-range dependency.
